value.author: platine
value.layerInfo: FCC crystal lattice shape generator with spin, swing, tumble, and oscillation animation modes.

cells: Number of unit cells per axis (1–8).
latticeSize: Overall scale of the lattice in pixels.
atomSize: Atom radius as a fraction of the lattice unit.
outputMode: What to draw: atoms only, bonds only, or both.
mergeAtoms: Output all atoms merged into one seamless closed path. Fill and glow effects apply to the entire shape as a whole.
animMode: Keyframe: drive rotX/Y/Z in the timeline. Spin/Swing/Tumble: computed from time.
rotX: Base X rotation in degrees. Offset in Spin/Swing/Tumble modes.
spinAxis: Which axis or axes to spin around.
spinSpeed: Degrees per second (free). Degrees per loop when Loop Frames is set — use 360 for one full rotation per loop.
swingSpeed: Cycles per second (free). Cycles per loop when Loop Frames is set — use 1 for one full back-and-forth per loop.
swingRange: Total arc of the swing in degrees (peak-to-peak).
swingEase: Easing function applied to the swing motion.
tumbleX: X-axis rotation: degrees/second (free), or degrees/loop when Loop Frames is set.
tumbleY: Y-axis rotation: degrees/second (free), or degrees/loop when Loop Frames is set.
tumbleZ: Z-axis rotation: degrees/second (free), or degrees/loop when Loop Frames is set.
oscOn: Adds a sinusoidal oscillation on top of any animation mode.
oscFreq: Cycles per second (free). Cycles per loop when Loop Frames is set — use an integer for clean looping.
loopFrames: Set to your comp length (e.g. 240) to lock the animation to a perfect loop. All speed values switch to per-loop units: Spin Speed 360 = one full rotation, Swing Speed 1 = one back-and-forth, Tumble X/Y/Z = total degrees rotated, Osc Frequency = number of oscillation cycles. 0 = free-running (default).
